slot4.lore: Formed within the depths of the earth, it moves through molten stone and scorched caverns, shaping volcanoes among the land through heat and pressure.

common.lore: The cold of winter. Air chills and frost gathers in its wake. Snowfall follows as it passes, and mountains are left sealed in ice where it lingers.
